stdout:
# Marketing (reply-engagement): Text Syndicate -- reply candidate for @keitaro_aigc tweet 2076799805838516599

Target tweet links an article about a 160k-star/7.5M-install AI coding tool's "5-skill development line" framework, as told by the tool's own author.

## Self-critique applied
- Specificity: reply doesn't fabricate details about the article's content (which wasn't independently verifiable from the tweet alone) -- instead asks a concrete, answerable question (which 1-2 of the 5 skills to adopt first at solo-developer scale) that adds a real practical angle without overclaiming knowledge of the source material.
- Payoff completeness: the question itself is the value-add (a genuine prioritization angle a solo/freelance audience would want answered), not an empty compliment.
- Experience honesty: no fabricated claim of having read/tested the framework.
- No links, no hashtags.

## Final reply text
個人開発の規模だと「5スキル」を全部揃える前に息切れしそうですが、最初の1〜2個だけ真似するならどれが費用対効果高いと思われますか？

Approved by operator 2026-07-14 for real posting as a reply to https://x.com/keitaro_aigc/status/2076799805838516599.
